title: My Projects
intro: Discover my key projects, demonstrating the practical application of ant colony optimization, blockchain mechanics, machine learning models, and multilingual Python/JavaScript web development.

eurasie.title: Eurasie en Analyse
eurasie.description: Geopolitical and economic analysis web resource focused on the Eurasian region, developed with Django and PostgreSQL. Features a multilingual interface, admin posting panel, and feedback forms.

aco.title: ACO Routing Exploration
aco.description: Interactive JS/Python simulation of the Ant Colony Optimization algorithm for dynamic shortest-path routing in networks. Demonstrates pheromone strength and evaporation effects in real time.

blockchain.title: Mini-Blockchain Implementation
blockchain.description: A lightweight blockchain prototype in Python/Flask. Implements SHA-256 block hashing, Merkle trees for transaction verification, Proof-of-Work consensus, and REST APIs for nodes.

ml.title: Data Science & Machine Learning
ml.description: A collection of predictive ML models. Includes a video claim classification model for TikTok (claim vs opinion) and an employee retention model for Salifort Motors with 96.2% accuracy.

pentaword.title: PentaWord Telegram Bot
pentaword.description: Multilingual Wordle-like linguistic game Telegram bot. Built using aiogram/asyncio, supports three difficulty levels, three languages (RU, EN, FR), and interactive emoji clues.

chicken.title: Chicken Strike
chicken.description: Arcade browser clicker game developed on raw HTML5 Canvas and JavaScript with fluid animations, scoreboard mechanics, and fully responsive viewports.

meta.title: Projects – Iliya Glazunov
meta.description: Explore Iliya Glazunov's project portfolio, showing his expertise in Python engineering, interactive simulations, and predictive data modeling.
meta.keywords: projects, Python development, Telegram bots, machine learning, web apps, Godot, Iliya Glazunov
